First, implement the helper function to compute the LCP between two strings.

In TypeScript:

function lcp(a: string, b: string): number {
    let len = 0;
    while (len < a.length && len < b.length && a[len] === b[len]) {
        len++;
    }
    return len;
}

Then, compute lcp_pairs, left_max, right_max, diag_lcp.

Now, the code:

function solve(words: string[]): number[] {
    const n = words.length;
    if (n === 0) return [];
    
    // Precompute lcp_pairs
    const lcpPairs: number[] = [];
    for (let i = 0; i < n - 1; i++) {
        lcpPairs.push(lcp(words[i], words[i + 1]));
    }
    
    // Precompute left_max
    const leftMax: number[] = new Array(n).fill(0);
    for (let i = 1; i < n; i++) {
        leftMax[i] = Math.max(leftMax[i - 1], lcpPairs[i - 1]);
    }
    
    // Precompute right_max
    const rightMax: number[] = new Array(n).fill(0);
    for (let i = n - 2; i >= 0; i--) {
        rightMax[i] = Math.max(lcpPairs[i], rightMax[i + 1]);
    }
    
    // Precompute diag_lcp
    const diagLcp: number[] = new Array(n - 2).fill(0);
    for (let j = 0; j < n - 2; j++) {
        diagLcp[j] = lcp(words[j], words[j + 2]);
    }
    
    // Compute answer
    const answer: number[] = new Array(n).fill(0);
    for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) {
        let part1 = 0;
        if (i >= 1) {
            part1 = leftMax[i - 1];
        }
        let part2 = 0;
        if (i >= 1 && i < n - 1) {
            part2 = diagLcp[i - 1];
        }
        let part3 = 0;
        if (i < n - 1) {
            part3 = rightMax[i + 1];
        }
        answer[i] = Math.max(part1, part2, part3);
    }
    
    return answer;
}

function solve(words: string[]): number[] {

   const n = words.length;

   if (n === 0) return [];

   // Compute lcp array

   const lcp: number[] = [];

   for (let i = 0; i < n - 1; i++) {

      lcp.push(lcpLength(words[i], words[i + 1]));

   }

   // Compute prefix_max and suffix_max

   const prefixMax: number[] = new Array(lcp.length);

   const suffixMax: number[] = new Array(lcp.length);

   if (lcp.length === 0) {

      prefixMax[0] = 0;

      suffixMax[0] = 0;

   } else {

      prefixMax[0] = lcp[0];

      for (let i = 1; i < lcp.length; i++) {

         prefixMax[i] = Math.max(prefixMax[i - 1], lcp[i]);

      }

      suffixMax[lcp.length - 1] = lcp[lcp.length - 1];

      for (let i = lcp.length - 2; i >= 0; i--) {

         suffixMax[i] = Math.max(suffixMax[i + 1], lcp[i]);

      }

   }

   const answer: number[] = new Array(n);

   for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) {

      const modifiedLength = n - 1;

      if (modifiedLength <= 1) {

         answer[i] = 0;

         continue;

      }

      let currentMax: number;

      if (i === 0) {

         // currentMax is suffixMax[1]

         currentMax = (lcp.length >= 2) ? suffixMax[1] : -Infinity;

      } else if (i === n - 1) {

         // currentMax is prefixMax[n-3]

         currentMax = (n - 3 >= 0) ? prefixMax[n - 3] : -Infinity;

      } else {

         const leftPart = i - 2;

         let leftMax = -Infinity;

         if (leftPart >= 0) {

            leftMax = prefixMax[leftPart];

         }

         const rightPart = i + 1;

         let rightMax = -Infinity;

         if (rightPart < lcp.length) {

            rightMax = suffixMax[rightPart];

         }

         currentMax = Math.max(leftMax, rightMax);

      }

      // Now check if i is not at the ends

      let newLcp = 0;

      if (i !== 0 && i !== n - 1) {

         const a = words[i - 1];

         const b = words[i + 1];

         newLcp = lcpLength(a, b);

      }

      // Now compute answer[i]

      if (i === 0 || i === n - 1) {

         answer[i] = currentMax;

      } else {

         answer[i] = Math.max(currentMax, newLcp);

      }

   }

   return answer;

}

// Helper function to compute LCP length between two strings

function lcpLength(a: string, b: string): number {

   const minLen = Math.min(a.length, b.length);

   for (let i = 0; i < minLen; i++) {

      if (a[i] !== b[i]) {

         return i;

      }

   }

   return minLen;

}
